_note: Copy this to <repo>/.claude/create-github-issue.json and replace the placeholder values. Only `github.owner` and `github.repo` are required; everything else falls back to skill defaults (English summary + body, standard Fibonacci matrix, split-offered at 21/34/55, split-mandatory at 89, SP as `sp:<N>` labels, milestone in 'current' mode). The language/estimation blocks below demonstrate a non-English body setup — drop them if the EN defaults fit your project.

bodySections.heading: Ziel
bodySections.purpose: was soll erreicht werden — WAS + WOZU

bodySections.heading: Hintergrund
bodySections.purpose: Kontext, was bereits existiert, warum jetzt
bodySections.skipWhen: trivialer Bugfix — dann weglassen, nicht mit 'entfällt' platzhaltern

fieldQuestions.milestone: Milestone: in aktuellen Milestone einsortieren, oder leer lassen?
fieldQuestions.assignee: Assignee: dir zuordnen, oder leer lassen?
